bone.$description: Bone — Page background, large section canvases — the warm off-white that gives the system its paper-like editorial feel

paper-white.$description: Paper White — Card surfaces, elevated panels, light benefit cards — sits one step above Bone to create lift without shadows

cocoa.$description: Cocoa — Dark accent cards, inverted text blocks — warm near-black that softens pure ink and keeps dark sections feeling organic rather than digital

ink.$description: Ink — Primary text, nav links, logo wordmark, hairline borders, hero backdrop

stone.$description: Stone — Secondary body copy, muted helper text, subdued descriptions

ash.$description: Ash — Subtle link hover shadows, barely-there elevation hints

goudy-old-style.$description: Sole typeface for headlines, section titles, product names, card titles, and editorial body — a classical Venetian serif that signals craft and heritage. The narrow weight range (400 only) and tight line-heights (1.05–1.08) let the type sit in dense, menu-like stacks. Letter-spacing of -0.012em tightens optical gaps in display sizes without losing the serif's elegance.

system-sans-ui-chrome.$description: Inferred secondary face for navigation, buttons, captions, and dense utility text where serif would be illegible at small sizes. Kept restrained so the serif remains dominant.

bone.$description: Surface level 0: Page-level canvas, most section backgrounds

paper-white.$description: Surface level 1: Card surfaces, product panels, light benefit cards

cocoa.$description: Surface level 2: Inverted accent cards, dark feature blocks

ink.$description: Surface level 3: Hero backdrop, footer, maximum contrast slabs
